perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts inside a warehouse-style store with two women standing in front of a large pile of plush toys. One woman wears a white bucket hat and a black off-the-shoulder dress, and the other has long dark hair in a dark top. They are holding oversized Sanrio plushies (Hello Kitty and Kuromi). (2) The camera zooms in as they handle the plushies, showing the 'Black Friday' signage in the background. The women smile, point at the toys, and look at the camera enthusiastically. (3) They continue to hold and hug the toys, moving them around to show different characters while gesturing towards the pricing information displayed on-screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An enthusiastic male voice provides high-energy narration over an upbeat, fast-paced electronic background track. (2) As the narrator speaks about the price and value of the plushies, the two women on screen chime in with brief laughter and affirmative vocalizations. (3) The background music remains constant throughout, while faint ambient warehouse noise (distant voices and movement) is occasionally audible under the main audio tracks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken dialogue about the Sanrio plushies and their price. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful titles appear at the top and bottom including 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', 'Black Friday Deal' (in Chinese characters), and 'Everyone is rushing to buy Sanrio 18-inch lying dolls - surprisingly less than 500 dollars'. (3) Correction Text: A specific overlay appears in the middle of the video stating 'Slip of tongue correction: 500 dollars each is correct!' in a white box with red and black text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Showcase -> Price Breakdown -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in the foreground, 1 blurry passer-by in the background aisle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a white NY bucket hat and a black ruffled dress; the second woman has long straight dark hair and is wearing a dark, elegant top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial lighting, and shelves stocked with various products, specifically a large bin filled with plush toys and Black Friday promotional signs.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut with continuous background music

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature -> Price Value -> Social Proof
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional shopping guide, specifically highlighting a Black Friday discount on Sanrio plush toys at Costco. By utilizing high-energy narration, fast-paced editing, and clear price comparisons, it aims to drive urgency and consumer interest in visiting the store for this specific deal.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing information, specific location (Costco), and positive product demonstration.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration with variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video heavily relies on visual 'anchors' like the Costco logo and Sanrio characters to immediately establish trust and interest with the audience.
